## [00:00 - 01:55]

Hey there, my name is Brock Johnson and essentially it's my job to help people grow and monetize on Instagram. I've been doing this for about seven years since I was actually a sophomore in college and it's what I geek out over. It's what I love to do and I like to try to empower people by giving them the direct no BS, no fluff information about what they need to know about growing and making money on Instagram. I think Instagram can be such a fun, rewarding place and it can be that for so many different reasons. For myself, I love connecting with my community, engaging with my audience and I actually really enjoy creating content. Regardless of who you are, I think it's important to find what brings you joy on Instagram. What specific areas of creating content, engaging with your community or just existing as a business owner on Instagram fills up your cup and brings you joy. I also think it's so flip and cool that we exist in a day and age, in a time where we can connect with thousands, maybe even millions of people just at our fingertips on our phone. Like just by posting some content, showing up, making some posts on Instagram, we can reach so many people all over the world. We can change lives. We can get our ideas, our thoughts, our opinions, our businesses, our products out there basically for free. That is crazy. That is something that people didn't have access to 20 plus years ago and 20 years from now it's probably going to be very different. But we exist in this beautiful sweet spot this day and age where we can still use social media pretty much for free to organically grow our business and impact lives around the world. That excites me every single day. The opportunity to get to connect with people all over the world is pretty freaking cool and so I'm really excited to get to teach you all about growing on Instagram.
